purpose: A tile grid popover anchored to the ShellBar that lets users jump to other SAP products or apps. Shows product logos + names in a compact grid. Distinct from UserMenu (personal) and Notifications (alerts).
whenToUse: As the app-switcher in ShellBar for SAP products (Cloud ERP, SuccessFactors, Ariba, etc.)
When users have multiple entitled products
For cross-product navigation in a multi-app landscape
As the 'waffle menu' pattern of the SAP shell
whenNotToUse: For in-app page navigation — use SideNavigation
For user account actions — use UserMenu
For a small number of app links (< 4) — put them directly in ShellBar
doRules: Show product logos alongside names for scannability
Group products by category (Core / Add-ons / External) when the list is long
Support keyboard navigation across the grid
dontRules: Do not include non-SAP or non-entitled products
Do not use for a single product — omit the switch entirely
Do not put per-page actions inside — that belongs elsewhere
Do not exceed 20 products in the base view — paginate or search

layoutGuidance.placement: Anchored to ShellBar (typically left of user avatar)
layoutGuidance.alignment: Icon top, label below, centered per cell

contentGuidance.contentRules: Standardized product names; icons match brand marks

requirements: Product logos have alt text (product name)
Keyboard: Arrow keys navigate grid; Enter selects; Escape closes
